programme.title: How The Martial Art Khomlainai Brings Bodo And Santhal Communities Together
programme.desc: In Assam, decades of conflict kept Bodo and Santhal communities apart. Now the traditional martial art Khomlainai is bringing children together, who have never spoken or played with each other before. Mejing Narzary, a former Bodo underground fighter, and Khermu Karmakar, a former general of the Santhal insurgent force, have achieved this miracle.

programme.title: The Haydn Expedition, Part 2
programme.desc: Is Joseph Haydn's music boring? Not at all, say Paavo Jaervi and the musicians of the Deutsche Kammerphilharmonie Bremen. On their musical journey through Haydn's symphonic works, they discover new and surprising things.

programme.title: Superstars Comedy: BB30
programme.desc: Bau is a poor lawyer who has never won in litigation. He is a righteous guy but his unstable character brings him under disciplinary investigation, during which he meets a beautiful doctor, Cheng. However, since Cheng often deposes against Bau, misunderstanding and conflict grow between the two. On the other hand, Susan, an aerobic dancing instructor, has a deep passion for Bau for a long time and this makes Mo feel jealous and determine to go against him. As Bau and Mo go together, troubles and laughers are stirred up...

programme.title: All of a Sudden
programme.desc: Lin Guocai and Miao Keyi was an admirable couple. Lin appeared to be a very loving husband, but in fact he was having an affair with his assistant Stella. He even contemplated to murder his wife for her sumptuous wealth which was worth over billions. One day, Miao was kidnapped by Stella‘s husband Pang, whose initial plan was to beat Lin up. He hid Miao in a rented boat and left. Miao was almost raped by the vicious boat keeper Biao. Fortunately, she was saved by Pang and they became friends. It wasn‘t long when Pang gradually discovered he has fallen in love with Miao...

programme.title: Final Run
programme.desc: MA and KAU were the Senior Inspectors of Narcotics Bureau. They were smuggling with the Golden Triangle in Thailand. CHEUNG – an officer of Custom Department. CHEUNG and MA were good friend since they studied in the University. MA's group wanted to get more help in custom, he asked CHEUNG to be his partner, but CHEUNG refused. While KAU was very hasty, he killed all CHEUNG's family. Then, CHEUNG wanted to take revenge against them. However, MA and KAU made a plan to get CHEUNG into trouble. At last, CHEUNG escaped to Thailand and stayed at his aunt's house. MA and KAU knew that CHEUNG escaped to Thailand, so they tried their best to kill him, but they did not succeed...

programme.title: Biz Talk
programme.desc: A groundbreaking 30-minute interview show, giving an in-depth look into how top companies around the world conduct business and how policymakers view the fast-changing world economy. programme.title: Inheritors
programme.desc: Inheritors is a multi-media product from CGTN that shines a light on China's rich Intangible Cultural Heritage. Each 30-minute TV edition is hosted by a long-term expatriate in China who has a unique understanding of the country's culture. He or she will introduce viewers to people who are dedicating their lives to its protection, inheritance, innovation, development and promotion.

programme.title: The Agenda
programme.desc: A weekly talk-show looking beyond the headlines and “accepted wisdom” to find the real story. Hosted by award-winning journalist and presenter Stephen Cole, The Agenda quite simply sets The Agenda . You won't find the same-old talking heads recycling platitudes; instead thought-provoking guests to debate and explore key issues of today's world. Using virtual reality graphics to bring subjects to life, Stephen will navigate through subjects ranging from “Prove That Climate Change Exists” to “Who Will Win the Race to Space”. Opposing views will be given opportunity to flourish and develop into a meaningful conversation. The Agenda: No nonsense talk; Challenging perceptions.

Using virtual reality graphics to bring subjects to life, Stephen will navigate through subjects ranging from “Prove That Climate Change Exists” to “Who Will Win the Race to Space”. Opposing views will be given opportunity to flourish and develop into a meaningful conversation. The Agenda: No nonsense talk; Challenging perceptions.

programme.title: The World Today
programme.desc: The World Today is the core rolling service of CGTN. keep viewers up-to-date with all the world's top stories as they happen.

programme.title: Inheritors
programme.desc: Inheritors is a multi-media product from CGTN that shines a light on China's rich Intangible Cultural Heritage. Each 30-minute TV edition is hosted by a long-term expatriate in China who has a unique understanding of the country's culture. He or she will introduce viewers to people who are dedicating their lives to its protection, inheritance, innovation, development and promotion.

programme.desc: A groundbreaking 30-minute interview show, giving an in-depth look into how top companies around the world conduct business and how policymakers view the fast-changing world economy. programme.title: Citizen Pinoy
programme.desc: Filipinos around the world hope to immigrate to the US, legalize their status in the US, or be reunited with their family in the US after years of separation. In this public service program, Attorney Michael J Gurfinkel explains, in plain English, the intricacies of US immigration laws and procedures, as well as advises of avenues to immigrate and developments in US immigration laws. Just because you're half a world away from home, you can still get answers to your US immigration questions.

programme.title: The Healing Eucharist[Live]
programme.desc: A weekly TV Mass broadcasted from the ABS-CBN Studios.

programme.title: Citizen Pinoy
programme.desc: Filipinos around the world hope to immigrate to the US, legalize their status in the US, or be reunited with their family in the US after years of separation. In this public service program, Attorney Michael J Gurfinkel explains, in plain English, the intricacies of US immigration laws and procedures, as well as advises of avenues to immigrate and developments in US immigration laws. Just because you're half a world away from home, you can still get answers to your US immigration questions.

programme.title: E4 - Exploring Western Canada
programme.desc: In Revelstoke, Alexis and Thomas discover slackcountry skiing, a hybrid between resort and backcountry skiing. Though seemingly more accessible, slackcountry carries the same avalanche and rescue risks.

programme.title: E10 - Julie De Libran
programme.desc: One of the most Parisian and unusual designers discusses her spring-summer 2023 haute couture collection. The focus is firmly on the versatility of the garments, the work on the bias and sequins...

programme.title: E2 - The Thyssen-Bornemisza Museum, Madrid, Modern Painting
programme.desc: The collections at the Thyssen-Bornemisza Museum also include works by some of the greatest modern painters, such as: Monet, Morisot, Van Gogh, Gauguin, Derain, van Dongen, Cezanne, Braque, Kandinsky...

programme.title: E9 - Weekend In Dijon
programme.desc: With its cobbled streets and medieval buildings, Dijon, capital of the Dukes of Burgundy, offers an enchanting setting steeped in both tradition and modernity. At the heart of Burgundy's wine-growing region, this historic town invites you to take a trip full of discoveries.

programme.title: E3 - Cooking With Beer
programme.desc: The world of beer, for the pleasure of taste! With actor Hubert Proulx, beer expert Simon Gaudreault, pastry chef Remy Couture, and chef Guillaume Aucoin, beer is integrated into various recipes.

programme.desc: A Tamil dentist and Punjabi businessman fall in love, navigating family expectations, parenting, and emotional complexities across cultures.

programme.title: E1 - A Big Day of Rescues & Learning!
programme.desc: Join Digley, Dazey & the crew for a big day of rescues & learning! When the barn at Old MacDonald's Farm catches fire, the crew uses quick thinking to extinguish the flames. Then, a trip to the mountains goes wrong when an avalanche traps them in a tunnel, & they must find a clever way to escape! The rescues continue as Digley faces his fear of heights to restore a broken clock & the friends work together to save Scout after she falls down a hole during a thunderstorm.

programme.title: E1 - A Super Fun Underwater Sing-Along!
programme.desc: Get ready for a super fun underwater sing-along with The Sharksons! Join the fun as five little reef sharks learn their lesson about jumping on the bed. Then, meet an 'Itsy Bitsy' sea spider who keeps trying to climb an underwater cliff with a little help from her friends! The classic rhymes continue with a curious crab acting out the story of Humpty Dumpty & a cozy pajama party with ten friends in a bed. It's a sing-along full of classic tunes with a fun, fishy twist!

programme.title: E2 - Sweet Dreams & Goodnight Songs!
programme.desc: Get ready for sweet dreams & goodnight songs! First, Mia giggles with delight as she gathers four of her favorite stuffed animals into bed with her for a fun game of 'Ten in the Bed.' The bedtime fun continues as Maple & Muffin play a game of 'Five Little Monkeys' during their bubble bath. Then, Grandma Panda helps Mia & Bari embark on a fantastic adventure, building a little rocket out of cushions to go on an adventure to the moon!

programme.title: E1 - From Dinosaurs To Pet Knights!
programme.desc: Blippi is on an adventure from dinosaurs to pet knights! He travels back in time with Tabbs to help a little Microraptor prove that being small has its benefits when they rescue a giant sauropod from the mud. Then, they head to the African savannah to learn how to roar, sneak & pounce like a lion! Back at the clubhouse, Blippi learns how to interpret a puppy's tail wags & even travels back in time again to help a real-life knight in shining armor—who happens to be a corgi!

programme.title: E1 - A Super Fun Day on the Farm!
programme.desc: Join Ella for a super fun day at Lellobee City Farm! First, when a nest of baby duck eggs starts to hatch, Ella has to play 'Mummy Duck' to keep all the cute but runaway ducklings together! Then, Rishi organizes all the animals for a friendly game of soccer, where everyone learns each other's animal sounds. The fun day ends with a new arrival, as Ella & Mei find & adopt a stray cat named Bingo, welcoming him to his new home!

programme.title: E2 - Zero Gravity, Shrink Rays & More Mayhem!
programme.desc: Get ready for some sci-fi mayhem with Arpo & Baby Daniel! The chaos begins when Daniel accidentally switches Arpo to zero-gravity mode, causing the robot & everything he touches to float around the city! Then, Arpo accidentally shrinks Baby Daniel with a shrink ray & has to search frantically for the tiny toddler. The out-of-this-world adventure continues when the pesky squirrel takes Daniel on an unexpected trip to outer space in a make-believe rocket!

programme.title: E1 - A Super Fun Underwater Sing-Along!
programme.desc: Get ready for a super fun underwater sing-along with The Sharksons! Join the fun as five little reef sharks learn their lesson about jumping on the bed. Then, meet an 'Itsy Bitsy' sea spider who keeps trying to climb an underwater cliff with a little help from her friends! The classic rhymes continue with a curious crab acting out the story of Humpty Dumpty & a cozy pajama party with ten friends in a bed. It's a sing-along full of classic tunes with a fun, fishy twist!

programme.title: E5 - Baby Star
programme.desc: Little Baby Bum is here to help you fall to sleep; with soothing, relaxing animated lullabies. These gentle and sensory videos are accompanied by lullaby versions of much loved nursery rhymes, helping to take you to the land of nod.

E3 - A New Zealand Christmas
programme.desc: See how one animal family’s tragedy is another’s holiday dinner as New Zealand’s mainland and island creatures, including penguins, flightless birds, sea lions, and sharks, battle to feed and protect their young in this marine environment.

programme.title: E4 - India & Sri Lanka's Deadly Mother's Day
programme.desc: Find out which creatures survive and whose luck will run out as animal mothers and moms-to-be struggle with sweltering temperatures, lurking predators, mating season, and drought on a day that proves to be no holiday.

programme.title: E5 - Pacific Islands: Commotion in the Ocean
programme.desc: Live through a sunny tropical September day with creatures from Polynesia to the Indonesian archipelago. See how the sun affects the movement, feeding habits, and mating rituals of everything from tiny zooplankton to whale sharks.

programme.title: E6 - Australian Spring Fever
programme.desc: Celebrate the first day of spring with Aussie creatures looking for either a dinner or a date. From the kangaroos in the grasslands to the koalas in the trees to the freshwater crocodiles, they hunt for food or fight for breeding rights.

programme.title: E3 - A New Zealand Christmas

programme.title: E6 - Australian Spring Fever
programme.desc: Celebrate the first day of spring with Aussie creatures looking for either a dinner or a date. From the kangaroos in the grasslands to the koalas in the trees to the freshwater crocodiles, they hunt for food or fight for breeding rights.

programme.title: E3 - Episode 3
programme.desc: Join the search for a Cooper’s hawk who’s taken a dangerous dip in a backyard pool. Catch the hijinks of the centre’s skunks as they try to avoid getting their shots, giving the team a closeup experience with the animals’ stinky natural defences.

programme.title: E1 - Ghosts of Cederberg
programme.desc: A rocky landscape, carved over eons by wind, water and fire, these are the Cederberg Mountains of South Africa. These imposing peaks are home to an incredible diversity of plants and animals. But there are some here that remain unseen, lurking in the shadows and ready to strike at any time...

programme.title: E4 - Crowded Islands
programme.desc: On rocky islands off the coast of South Africa, thousands of creatures congregate to breed. Among these, huge colonies of cape gannets dominate. Surrounded by rich waters, they can find enough to feed themselves and their young. But life is full of challenges for the breeding gannets...

programme.title: E2 - Laos: the Mountain Wilds
programme.desc: Steep mountains and tropical monsoons define the Mekong River valley on its route through Laos. Catch glimpses of the wildlife who find refuge in its vibrant ecosystems, from stump-tailed macaques to pied kingfishers to black-crested gibbons.

programme.title: E4 - The Karst Caves
programme.desc: Explore the stunning caves of Khammouane province in Laos. These natural wonders, squeezed between the Mekong River and the Annamite Range, are home to part-time and full-time residents, including bats, geckos, frogs, and giant centipedes.

programme.title: E5 - Nature's Crossroads
programme.desc: As the Mekong River travels down Thailand’s eastern border, it sculpts the land, creating hundreds of small waterways through the jungle. Take a trek though lands where rhesus macaques, elephants, and flying foxes live in harmony at the water’s edge.

programme.title: E2 - House Hunting Hermit Crabs
programme.desc: Get in line with hermit crabs for an orderly shell exchange on a Belize beach, then meet a Senegalese chimp’s pet genet. Float with an otter who swaps hostages for free meals and admire the agricultural prowess of leafcutter ants in the rainforest.

programme.title: E3 - Meerkat Survival School
programme.desc: Learn how to disarm and dine on scorpions with meerkat pups in the Kalahari Desert and review a lioness’ flirting strategy in Kenya. Meet same-sex penguin couples who are raising chicks together, then sign up for an Asian elephant babysitters’ club.

programme.title: E1 - The Outcasts
programme.desc: In the Luangwa Valley lies a grove of Ebony trees, home to a troop of baboons. But, there are dangers here – the resident leopard who, unlike the other predators, is powerful and agile enough to climb trees. He’s not an easy foe to elude.

programme.desc: Sonya suffers from a rare degenerative eye disease and is almost completely blind, but that doesn’t stop her from braving the wild alongside Bear Grylls to rediscover her love for the outdoors. Sonya’s spiritual approach to life enlightens bear, and her sense of adventure inspires all.

programme.desc: Traces of the Bobobobobone are found in a bee hive. Deca attempts take the bee hive. The angry bees start chasing after Deca and Shiro.

programme.title: E260 - Xingo's World/The Feels/Past Aliens Present/Dreamtime/The Greatest Lake
programme.desc: Ben, Gwen, and Grandpa Max are on the road again and are supposed to be taking in the beautiful sights, but Ben refuses to put his video games away.

programme.title: E338 - Earthquake-Proof Bear/The Spirit Of Competition/Odd-Job Crab/Ordeal Of Comfort/Outboa
programme.desc: The Lemmings discover that several drops of Tabasco sauce poured into a rock fault releases powerful sprays of steam that propel them high into the sky on a pot lid.

programme.title: E210 - Easter Egg Hunt
programme.desc: Tom and Jerry are collecting Easter eggs, Quacker hatches from one of the eggs and runs away from Tom. Jerry helps Quacker escape. Tom falls into the pond, Quacker and Jerry save Tom. They all share Easter basket treats in the end.

programme.title: E121 - Ask Not What Bunnies Can Do For You
programme.desc: It’s student council elections at Acme Loo! Babs and Buster both run for President, and they enlist Sweetie and Hamton as their respective campaign managers. That just leaves Plucky…who happily revels in the drama!

programme.title: E210 - Easter Egg Hunt
programme.desc: Tom and Jerry are collecting Easter eggs, Quacker hatches from one of the eggs and runs away from Tom. Jerry helps Quacker escape. Tom falls into the pond, Quacker and Jerry save Tom. They all share Easter basket treats in the end.

programme.desc: Foghorn Leghorn attempts to charm his future father-in-law. Daffy does a card trick. Elmer discovers a scaly surprise.

programme.title: E446 - Opera For One/Grounded
programme.desc: Mr Bean forgets to buy tickets to the opera, so he tricks the singer into performing in his back garden.

programme.title: E11 - Everyday Bears/Nom Nom
programme.desc: It's a normal day for the Bears. This means that Ice gets in a fight with a Roomba, Panda's life gets turned upside down when a mouse invades his room, and Grizz gets stuck in a tree. You know, everyday stuff for a bear.

programme.title: E4 - Reign Of Error
programme.desc: The school turns upside down with the arrival of a Bishonen prince. He is strikingly beautiful deeply troubled self-obsessed and carries a parasol – he pretty much ticks all the boxes for Charity.

programme.title: E121 - Ask Not What Bunnies Can Do For You
programme.desc: It’s student council elections at Acme Loo! Babs and Buster both run for President, and they enlist Sweetie and Hamton as their respective campaign managers. That just leaves Plucky…who happily revels in the drama!

programme.title: HSBC BWF World Tour 2026 YONEX-SUNRISE India Open -Final Men's Singles
HSBC BWF World Tour 2026 YONEX-SUNRISE India Open -Final Men's Singles

programme.title: Hong Kong Perspectives
programme.desc: Hong Kong Perspectives offers interviews with major SAR government officials, LegCo president, as well as experts from think tanks, the programme explains the essence of the Basic Law and explores how it has been implemented citing examples from the past.

programme.title: My Hong Kong Story
programme.desc: MY HONG KONG STORY: Special column of character record. Through the exquisite length of about 15 minutes in each episode, it tells the stories of Hong Kong people and what happened. For the national Chinese audience, understand the new perspective of Hong Kong.

programme.title: Muscat Classic / Tour Of Oman
programme.desc: Now entering its fourth edition, the Muscat Classic features on the ProSeries calendar, ahead of the Tour of Oman, which has been a fixture of the international cycling scene since 2010.

programme.title: CNBC Meets
programme.desc: Hosted by Tania Bryer, “CNBC Meets” is an intimate interview series that takes viewers inside the lives and legacies of trailblazers across business, entertainment, sport and politics. Each episode offers rare access to their homes, offices and empires - uncovering the ambitions, challenges and entrepreneurial mindsets that shaped their success and continue to drive them forward.

programme.title: CNBC Explains
programme.desc: ‘CNBC Explains' is a dynamic explainer series that dives deep into the forces shaping our world. Each episode unpacks complex business and economic topics, breaking them down into clear, compelling narratives. With expert insights, data-driven visuals and a global perspective, this series helps viewers understand not just what is happening, but why it matters.

programme.title: Leaders Playbook
programme.desc: Through candid, in-depth interviews with America's top CEOs, CNBC's Senior Media & Tech Correspondent Julia Boorstin explores the leadership philosophies, strategic decisions and personal decisions that have shaped today's most influential companies.

programme.title: Built For Billions
programme.desc: ‘Built for Billions' uncovers the blueprints behind the world's biggest tech empires-how they scale, monetize, and dominate markets. From innovative revenue models to dramatic turnarounds, each episode reveals lessons in resilience, leadership and reinvention that power profitability in the digital age.

programme.title: The Tonight Show Starring Jimmy Fallon

programme.desc: The 114th drama serial follows two women, Rin (Mikami Ai) and Naomi (Kosaka Juri), who paved the way for nursing in the Meiji era. programme.title: E202 - Windy Autumn Day
programme.desc: It is a cold and windy day. At the park, all the leaves have turned red and yellow. It is so windy that Peppa's ball blows into the pond and George's hat blows into a tree.

programme.title: E103 - Buzzy Croc / Dream House
programme.desc: Mr. Crocodile worries he'll be caught between his old best friend Buzzy and his new best friend Daisy. // Daisy and Mr. Crocodile's simple treehouse gets complicated when they try to add space for all their friends.

programme.title: E804 - The Garbage Truck Challenge
programme.desc: Garbage Truck Blaze is competing in the ultimate trash-themed race: the Garbage Truck Challenge! But Garbage Truck Crusher is also in the race, and he'll do anything to crush the competition. Who will come out on top in this dump truck duel?

programme.title: E123 - Barba TV / The Museum
programme.desc: The barbababies are glued to the TV. Since they love it so much, their parents encourage them to make their own shows. // The Barbapapa visit the museum of evolution. On the program: creation of the Earth, Precambrian submarine and... dinosaurs!

programme.title: E109 - Toy / Astrofools / Mole
programme.desc: Tim does all he can to get the new DinoStar toy. // It's a day for practical jokes, but Tim doesn't know when to stop. // Tim and Dad have to catch a troublesome mole.

programme.title: E623 - Peppa's Circus

programme.title: Reduce Food Waste
programme.desc: Today the Grimwades decide to reduce food waste by using up the food that will soon go out of date before buying some more. Daddy reminds Mummy how inventive the children are. Heze and Harper come to the rescue with their cookery show!

programme.title: Paper Helicopter
programme.desc: Paper planes need a new twist, so grab your scissors and try making this! Whirl show you how to make a spinning helicopter.

programme.title: Cederberg - The Secret Library
programme.desc: Four youngsters embark on a search for a secret library hidden in a remote mountain range where an ancient civilisation existed for thousands of years. Using an old map, they find the library in a cave and unlock the secret to their country's survival.

programme.title: Connect with Tech
programme.desc: When rain prevents Darwin and Newts from holding a ‘show and tell' day, they use the Internet to connect with their forest whanau remotely.

programme.title: Bat BnB
programme.desc: Host Alie Ward presents a dog-washing wand, a Bat hotel that keeps bugs away, a device that allows doctors to examine people on the other side of the world, and the inventors of the Chairless Chair.

programme.title: Fire and Flames
programme.desc: Dry weather caused by climate change has caused a forest fire, and the Black Forest is ablaze. Only the MeteoHeroes can prevent an environmental catastrophe! Pluvia and Nubess are on their way to the North Sea.

programme.title: Hogie Goes to Jeju
programme.desc: Bernie loses his glasses on a trip to Jeju Island! Luckily for him, Hogie makes friends with Min-ja, who has heaps of knowledge about the island of Jeju, and who can ask her big family for some extra help.

programme.title: Puppy!
programme.desc: Naomi is overjoyed with her new puppy-until it mysteriously vanishes before her friends Carol and Jessi arrive. Convinced it's been stolen, she accuses everyone, but nothing adds up. Did someone really take the puppy, or is there more to the story?

programme.title: Paper Helicopter
programme.desc: Paper planes need a new twist, so grab your scissors and try making this! Whirl show you how to make a spinning helicopter.

programme.title: Trip to Iran
programme.desc: Zoe has to make some complicated calculations, but she has no electronic device at hand that could help her with that, so she is in a bit of a panic. Milo does not seem to have an answer. As for Alim, he sees the solution to her problems in a trip to Iran!

programme.title: This is Where it Starts
programme.desc: It's the Artistic British Championships. Alice is facing strong competition as she is up against Amelie and Phoebe's teammates from the European Championships. Meanwhile, Ekraj is late for podium training and doesn't seem focused on the competition.

programme.title: Under Pressure
programme.desc: Marisa is used to supporting others, but today it's her dog Millie going under the knife. Walter, the Whippet, is a changed dog at home, but how will he cope in the park?

programme.title: Bones
programme.desc: In this episode, Dr Chris and Dr Xand look at bones, and show you an experiment to make them bendy.

programme.title: Lungs
programme.desc: In this episode, Dr Chris and Dr Xand look at lungs, and show you an experiment to measure how much air they can hold.

programme.title: Paper Helicopter
programme.desc: Paper planes need a new twist, so grab your scissors and try making this! Whirl show you how to make a spinning helicopter.

programme.title: Connect with Tech

programme.title: Trip to Iran
programme.desc: Zoe and Milo offer Alim a snack, but when he refuses, they eat it themselves. Alim protests-he was just being polite! To explain, Alim takes them to Iran to meet Aydin during Nowruz, where they learn about Ta'arof, the custom of refusing three times before accepting.

programme.title: Trip to Iran

programme.title: E4 - India - Avocados
programme.desc: Not just on toast: A trade deal opens up new partnerships, providing Australian avocados to a new generation in India with a taste for new foods.

programme.title: E4 - The 80S - The Pace Race
programme.desc: The '80s saw the rise of the legendary fast bowler. Australia cruised into the decade fielding two lethal pacemen, while the West Indies blasted onto the scene with a quartet of very cool and very fast deadly bowling weapons.

programme.desc: Benjamin Law meets people turning to AI to deal with personal and existential crises, treating it as a confidante, a therapist or a means to talk to the dead. While it helps some others experience devastating consequences.

E5
programme.desc: 文太（大泉洋）是一名被公司解雇的落魄上班族。在和妻子離婚後，因財產分割與賠償金而耗盡積蓄，只能過著寄宿在網咖的生活。就在某一天，文太奇蹟地通過了一家公司的最終面試。在文太前往公司提前準備好的住宅時，一位陌生女子突然出現在家中並對他說「歡迎回來」。這似乎是必須以「夫妻」的身分和這個「陌生的妻子」一起生活。文太瞬間成為有「一點點超能力」的英雄，被賦予的任務是——「拯救世界」。然而，還附帶了一條不合理又難以理解的規則：「不可以真心地去愛任何人」。

programme.title: E10
programme.desc: 故事從東京發生的一連串慘烈連環殺人案展開，而案件現場讓兩名記者的命運交織在一起。設樂浩暉（志尊淳）是週刊雜誌的知名自由撰稿人，筒井萬琴則是電視台新聞節目導播（岸井雪乃），敏銳且富有正義感。兩人因追蹤同一起案件而相識，並在攜手調查的過程中逐漸被彼此吸引。然而，隨著調查的深入，浩暉的身分卻越來越可疑，他的過去與案件的關聯也逐漸浮出水面──他，究竟是無辜的旁觀者，還是那個令人聞風喪膽的連環殺人犯？

programme.desc: 故事從東京發生的一連串慘烈連環殺人案展開，而案件現場讓兩名記者的命運交織在一起。設樂浩暉（志尊淳）是週刊雜誌的知名自由撰稿人，筒井萬琴則是電視台新聞節目導播（岸井雪乃），敏銳且富有正義感。兩人因追蹤同一起案件而相識，並在攜手調查的過程中逐漸被彼此吸引。然而，隨著調查的深入，浩暉的身分卻越來越可疑，他的過去與案件的關聯也逐漸浮出水面──他，究竟是無辜的旁觀者，還是那個令人聞風喪膽的連環殺人犯？

programme.title: E10
programme.desc: 故事從東京發生的一連串慘烈連環殺人案展開，而案件現場讓兩名記者的命運交織在一起。設樂浩暉（志尊淳）是週刊雜誌的知名自由撰稿人，筒井萬琴則是電視台新聞節目導播（岸井雪乃），敏銳且富有正義感。兩人因追蹤同一起案件而相識，並在攜手調查的過程中逐漸被彼此吸引。然而，隨著調查的深入，浩暉的身分卻越來越可疑，他的過去與案件的關聯也逐漸浮出水面──他，究竟是無辜的旁觀者，還是那個令人聞風喪膽的連環殺人犯？

programme.title: E22

programme.title: E40
programme.desc: 消防局長宋焰（楊洋飾）和急診科醫生許沁（王楚然飾）分別十年之後重逢，青春時代的兩人因家庭反對被迫分開，再相見時，兩人都有了許多成長和改變。由於工作性質的原因，宋焰和許沁漸漸有了交集。宋焰帶領十里台的消防員們為維護人民生命財產安全而英勇奮鬥，經歷了無數次血與火的生死考驗後仍不改初心。他的堅持感染著許沁，困擾他們多年的心結也漸漸被解開。兩人克服家庭阻力，最後重新走到一起，互相鼓勵，共同進步，用各自的專長守護著這座美麗的城市。
